text:
Created attachment 202473
Patch

Hi swills@,

I'm making a port of a weather forcast application called Meteo[1] which wants libappindicator's vapi files installed.

So I would like to make the VAPI option ON by default.

Regards,
Hiroki

[1] https://gitlab.com/bitseater/meteo
